hadith_entries.text:
872. Narrated Abu-Huraira; ‘Allah's Messenger
"Beware of suspicion, for suspicion is the worst of false tales,
and do not look for others' faults, and do not do spying on one
another, and do not practise Al-Najash and do not be jealous
of one another, and do not hate one desert (stop talking to)
one anohter. And O Allah's Worshippers! Be brothers
another, and do not!" (Bukhari)
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
Allah said:
